behavior_summary: Handles an actor/item entering a water trigger: plays/stops splash SFX, spawns visual splash sprites and short-lived helper processes to animate particles, and applies different outcomes for NPCs vs non-NPC items.
Performs guard checks (parameters present, Item::isOn, Item::getStatus bit 0x0800) and respects a global neverSinks flag to optionally skip destructive sinking behavior.

For NPCs: applies avatar-specific stasis or NPC animations, may mark NPC dead, center camera, move/teleport the NPC, and apply lethal damage (or teleport fallback) depending on conditions and special-case flag DevonHitWater.
For non-NPC items: resets cross-references and destroys item contents and the item itself unless exempted by specific type checks.
notable_control_flow: Early exit if both incoming item parameters are zero, if Item::isOn(item,0) returns true, or if Item::getStatus(item) has bit 0x0800 set.
Sound management: check isSFXPlaying for specific ids (0x63, 0xB1), stopSFX those ids when active, and spawn a short FREE::1C19 helper after stopping to handle cleanup/timing.

Visual creation: call FREE::2A56 for pre-step, compute item WorldPoint via Item::getPoint, createSprite for an initial ripple/splash, then spawn U8P_WATER::WATER::03A8 to drive repeated particle spawning.

Branch by Item::isNpc: if true, run NPC-specific logic (stasis for avatar id==1, Npc::doAnim, Npc::getHp + Item::receiveHit to kill, or urandom + Npc::teleport fallback) else run destruction path for items.
Global flag DevonHitWater can change which SFX/branch is used and is set when a particular special-case splash occurs.
open_questions: Exact meanings and ordering of the main function parameters (which push corresponds to 'context' vs 'item' vs aux) — inference based on BP offsets but not explicitly named.
Precise purpose and side effects of FREE::2A56 called before splash creation (likely positioning/timing) remain unclear.
Exact conditions that decide teleport fallback vs immediate lethal damage for NPCs (several branches inferred; thresholds and flag checks not fully explicit).
Which concrete item type ids are exempted from destruction in the non-NPC branch (disassembly shows type checks but specific semantic exceptions are only inferred).

main_function.name: U8P_WATER::0080
main_function.purpose: Respond to an item/NPC entering a water area: produce splash audio/visuals, spawn particle helper processes, and apply sinking/teleport/death or destruction effects depending on item type, NPC status, and global flags.
entry_conditions: Triggered by a water-area event (fast-area entry semantics).
Requires a non-zero item parameter (guarded by early return if parameters at [BP+0A] and [BP+0C] are both zero).
Skips processing if Item::isOn(item,0) is true or Item::getStatus(item) has bit 0x0800 set.
Respects neverSinks global - when set, destructive sinking/death branches are bypassed.

function_map.name: U8P_WATER::0080
function_map.role: Primary water-area event handler performing guards, SFX/sprite creation, spawning helpers, and dispatching NPC vs non-NPC outcomes.

function_map.name: U8P_WATER::03A8
function_map.role: Short-lived helper process that iterates a small counter and spawns per-particle helper U8P_WATER::WATER::0405 to drive ongoing splash/particle effects.

function_map.name: U8P_WATER::0405
function_map.role: Per-particle manager: legally creates a splash particle (Item::legal_create), advances animation frames (Item::getFrame/Item::setFrame), suspends/resumes until animation completes, then destroys the particle.

function_map.name: Item::isOn
function_map.role: Query whether an item is on/attached to something; used as an early guard.

function_map.name: Item::getStatus
function_map.role: Return item status flags; bit 0x0800 tested to skip water behavior.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn a helper process to continue creating/controlling ongoing splash particles after the initial splash.
Spawn per-particle managers when counters/timers indicate a new particle should be created.

external_calls.purpose: Skip water handling if the item is attached/standing on something.
Check status flags (test bit 0x0800) to early-exit for special items.
Avoid overlapping sound effects by testing SFX ids before stopping or replaying them.
Stop currently playing SFX (ids like 0x63 and 0xB1) prior to spawning a cleanup helper or replaying a different sound.
Spawn a short free/helper process after stopping SFX to handle timing/cleanup related to sounds.
Preparatory call before sprite creation (likely computes offsets or timing); exact purpose inferred.
Create initial visual splash/ripple at the item's world coordinates with visual parameters.
Play splash/impact sound effects; variant chosen depending on DevonHitWater and context.
Obtain a WorldPoint for creating subsequent particles at the correct location.
Create a legal particle/splash item at the passed WorldPoint.
Branch behavior: NPC-specific drowning/teleport/death logic vs non-NPC destruction.
When the avatar enters water (id==1), briefly freeze input/control (stasis) as part of the reaction.
Adjust kernel reference bookkeeping before/after moving or destroying items/NPCs to avoid dangling pointers.
Reposition an NPC/item (used when moving/removing an NPC in death/teleport handling).
Trigger an NPC death/drown animation and suspend until it finishes.
Obtain NPC HP to compute a lethal Item::receiveHit value (to cause death after drowning).
Apply damage to an NPC/item (used to inflict fatal damage after drowning).
Generate random offsets for teleport fallback locations when NPCs are not killed instantly.
Teleport NPC to a random nearby location as an alternative to immediate death in some branches.
Remove contents of non-NPC items that sink, prior to destroying the item instance.
Destroy non-NPC items that sink into the water.

reads.name: neverSinks
reads.likely_effect: When true, prevents sinking/destructive behavior for items entering water; causes function to skip destroy/drown branches.

reads.name: DevonHitWater
reads.likely_effect: Read to select alternate splash SFX/behavior for a specific character; affects which audio/visual branch is taken.

writes.name: DevonHitWater
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when a special-case splash for a particular character occurs (used to record that event).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Handles an actor/item entering a water trigger: plays/stops splash SFX, spawns visual splash sprites and short-lived helper processes to animate particles, and applies different outcomes for NPCs vs non-NPC items.
